resources.string: Start writing here… e.g. \'I felt really stressed about the exam but after my walk I felt much calmer.\'
No entries yet. Log your first mood to get started!
No data for this week yet
Software Engineer | Independent Researcher\nArena Candidate Master (ACM)
Applies strategic analysis and logical problem-solving skills from competitive chess to software engineering and socio-political research.
• Nizamix Technologies: Founder. Focused on robust, scalable software solutions.
• Dua Boutique: Founder. Exploring traditional and modern aesthetics.
• Casual Trader: Financial and asset trading markets utilizing behavioral and technical trends.
Creator of the \'Marginalized Maps\' research series. Documenting socio-political issues, historical frameworks, and infrastructural neglect in Sindh and Balochistan.
Active voice within the historic Channa community, organizing initiatives for the social, educational, and intellectual uplift of the Channa caste and Sindhi youth.
